title: Gooty Fort
tagline: Gooty Fort — heritage city of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: The Gooty Fort, also known as Ravadurg and Gutti Kota, is a ruined fort located on a hill in the Gooty town of Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: The Gooty Fort, also known as Ravadurg and Gutti Kota, is a ruined fort located on a hill in the Gooty town of Andhra Pradesh, India. The town of Gooty (originally, "Gutti") is located in the Ananthapur district of Andhra Pradesh. It is one of the centrally protected monuments of national importance.

topPlaces.name: Diesel Loco Shed, Gooty
topPlaces.description: Diesel Loco Shed, Gooty is an engine shed located in Gooty, Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Gooty
topPlaces.description: Gooty ( GUUTH-ee; Telugu: గుత్తి, transliterated as Guththi) is a town in Anantapur district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the headquarters of Gooty mandal in Anantapur revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Sri Sunama Jakini Matha
topPlaces.description: Sri Sunama Jakini Maata is a temple built to honor a legendary Indian woman who was deified. She was born in Suryavamshi Kshatriya Are-Katika community of Pinnepalli village in Anantapur district, Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Kasepalli
topPlaces.description: Kasepalli is a village in the Peddavadugur mandal in Anantapur District of Andhra Pradesh, India.

items.note: Diesel Loco Shed, Gooty is an engine shed located in Gooty, Andhra Pradesh in India.

Gooty ( GUUTH-ee; Telugu: గుత్తి, transliterated as Guththi) is a town in Anantapur district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the headquarters of Gooty mandal in Anantapur revenue division.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — Sri Sunama Jakini Matha & around

items.note: Sri Sunama Jakini Maata is a temple built to honor a legendary Indian woman who was deified. She was born in Suryavamshi Kshatriya Are-Katika community of Pinnepalli village in Anantapur district, Andhra Pradesh, India.
Kasepalli is a village in the Peddavadugur mandal in Anantapur District of Andhra Pradesh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gooty Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gooty Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gooty Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (79 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (238 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gooty Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gooty Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gooty Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Gooty Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gooty Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diesel Loco Shed, Gooty, Gooty, Sri Sunama Jakini Matha, Kasepalli.
